description: Real-time monitoring for the Gentis pub/sub messaging engine

panels.description: Total active connections across all modes. The gauge shows current load relative to threshold levels.
panels.title: Total Connections Gauge

panels.description: Active subscriptions gauge showing current subscription load.
panels.title: Total Subscriptions Gauge

panels.description: Message throughput gauge showing instantaneous messages published per second.
panels.title: Message Throughput Gauge

panels.description: Instantaneous rate of messages published, delivered, and dropped per second.
panels.title: Message Rate (instant)

panels.description: Cumulative total of messages published and delivered over time.
panels.title: Cumulative Messages

panels.description: Published vs Delivered message rates stacked to show total throughput and the gap between them.
panels.title: Throughput Breakdown (1m)

panels.description: Donut chart showing the proportion of connections by mode (server, relay, etc.).
panels.title: Connections by Mode

panels.description: Donut chart showing the proportion of subscriptions by mode.
panels.title: Subscriptions by Mode

panels.description: Active connections over time broken down by mode.
panels.title: Active Connections Over Time

panels.description: Active channels and total subscriptions over time.
panels.title: Channels & Subscriptions

panels.description: Connections and subscriptions per mode displayed as horizontal bars for quick comparison.
panels.title: Per-Mode Resource Bar

panels.description: Subscribers-to-connections ratio by mode. Higher values indicate more fan-out per connection.
panels.title: Subscription Fan-out Ratio

panels.description: Percentage of published messages that were successfully delivered. Drops below 95% should be investigated.
panels.title: Message Delivery Rate (%)

panels.description: Percentage of published messages that were dropped. Spikes above 5% trigger the critical threshold band.
panels.title: Message Drop Rate (%)

panels.description: Number of goroutines currently running in the Gentis process.
panels.title: Goroutines

panels.description: Heap memory allocated and in-use by the Gentis process.
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: CPU time consumed by the Gentis process, shown as a rate (cores used).
panels.title: CPU Usage (cores)

panels.description: Resident set size of the Gentis process.
panels.title: Resident Memory

panels.description: Number of open file descriptors.
panels.title: Open File Descriptors

panels.description: GC pause durations over time.
panels.title: GC Pause Duration

title: Gentis Dashboard
